subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the Fire of Divine Guidance! Moses heard from the Tree of Sinai the call "Verily, I am thy most exalted Lord!" and immediately cried out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنار هدی حضرت موسی از شجره سینا ندای انا ربک الاعلی شنید فورا فریاد
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
